_doc: Ordered quest chains. Each entry: qid (int), area (str, '' = stay), frame (str, '' = stay), pad (str, default 'Spawn'), items (int, default 1), mon (array of monster names/ids the hunt targets; empty/absent = any hostile in frame; names match case-insensitively by substring). Edit chains.json under UserData/Beyond to override locally; that file wins over this bootstrap. When area is set the runner auto-tfers; when only frame is set it walks to the cell's Goto pad. Ready-made chains (Lair, Bludrut Keep, Zard Killer, ...) are distributed through the launcher's Library window (Infinity-Files repo), not baked in here.
